checkpoints.name: IDEMPOTENCY
checkpoints.finding: All write operations use overwrite mode.

checkpoints.name: ERROR_HANDLING
checkpoints.finding: Each pipeline stage is wrapped in a try/except block.

checkpoints.name: PARTITION_PRUNING
checkpoints.finding: Read operations are filtered by date/partition column.

checkpoints.name: ROW_COUNT_LOGGING
checkpoints.finding: Row count is logged after each transformation stage.

checkpoints.name: BUSINESS_RULES
checkpoints.finding: Revenue is calculated as SUM(amount) WHERE status='COMPLETED' only.

checkpoints.name: NULL_HANDLING
checkpoints.finding: NULL checks are present on critical columns but not explicitly on primary key.
checkpoints.fix: Add explicit NULL checks on primary key.

checkpoints.name: BROADCAST_HINT
checkpoints.finding: broadcast() is used on the merchant dimension join.

checkpoints.name: HARDCODED_PATHS
checkpoints.finding: File paths are passed as parameters, not hardcoded.

checkpoints.name: SCHEMA_VALIDATION
checkpoints.finding: No schema validation check before transforming.

checkpoints.name: DEDUPLICATION
checkpoints.finding: Explicit dedup logic on transaction_id is present.

checkpoints.name: METADATA_OUTPUT
checkpoints.finding: Pipeline writes a run summary JSON at the end.

checkpoints.name: IMPORTS
checkpoints.finding: All imports are present and specific.

top_3_fixes: Add explicit NULL checks on primary key.
